uplink.description: Temperature/humidity report (report type 0x01): 23.50 C, 55%, battery 2.8 V
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder

uplink.description: Temperature/humidity report (report type 0x01) with negative temperature: -5.00 C, 40%
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder

uplink.description: Temperature/humidity report (report type 0x01) with low-battery flag set: 23.50 C, 55%
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (upstream renders Volt as '2.8(low battery)'; we surface battery 2.8 V plus the lowBattery flag)

uplink.description: Combined temperature/humidity/illuminance report (report type 0x12): 22.50 C, 60%, 350 lux, no alarms
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder

uplink.description: Combined temperature/humidity/illuminance report (report type 0x12) with alarm flags: 18.00 C, 75%, 1200 lux
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder; flags byte 42 = 0b00101010 (highTemp/highHumi/highIllum set)

uplink.description: Temperature/humidity report (report type 0x01) with sensor-invalid bit clear carries no measurement
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (upstream returns Temp '0xFFFF'/Humi '0xFF' sentinel)

uplink.description: Startup version report carries no measurement (report type 0x00)
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (upstream returns device-info fields)

uplink.description: Sensor enable/state snapshot carries no measurement (report type 0x11)
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (upstream returns categorical sensor-state bitmaps only)

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 is unsupported
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (upstream returns ConfigReportRsp on fPort 7)
